backend.changelog: Fixes Generate (CAD Bridge) false-aborting with 'Other documents open in SolidWorks' when the only open assembly is the BOM root. Root cause: 3DX-Connector auto-loads sub-component parts (sDOC-XXXXX.SLDPRT) as transitive references of the opened assembly, and the strict-mode foreign-doc gate flagged those auto-loaded parts as 'not part of the BOM'. Parts can never be the wrong-BOM root (that risk applies only to a different root assembly being active), so the foreign-doc check now skips parts entirely. Drawings retain the check. Symptom on 1.1.4 and earlier: SW opens the assembly + drawings, Generate shows 'Korak 3 od 3 - Gotovo' but all formats report 0/N produced, no /api/cadbridge/generate ever fires because handleGenerate exits on the foreign-doc abort.

cadBridge.changelog: PLMID identity chain end-to-end -- /sw-preflight + /list-open-documents now enrich open docs with plmId (IModelDocExtension.GetPLMID) and SummaryInfo title; frontend matches against the EngItem/3DShape pair via buildOursPidSet, with a trust-the-user step-4 fallback for cases where the chain breaks. Auto-open via /open-from-3dx fires when preflight finds no matching root open (replaces the lost 'Open in SW' affordance after Phase 2c-3 strict-mode gate). Stall threshold 3min -> 10min for slow internet / 3DX cold cache. STEP + 3D PDF now co-save during the post-loop standalone phase -- saves one SW open per component on dual-format runs (~50s for a 10-component BOM on cold cache). New diagnostic GET /api/cadbridge/sw-plm-props dumps every custom property + $PLMPRP probe pattern on the active doc.
